---
name: AI Task
about: Create a task owned by a logical AI worker with explicit review and dependency metadata
title: "[AI Task] "
labels: ["ai-task"]
---

## Objective

What outcome should this task produce?

## Business Context

Why this matters for the client, product, or delivery milestone.

## AI Worker

Example: `ai-backend-01`

## AI Role

Example: `backend-engineer`

## Managed By

Example: `ai-project-manager`

## Review Owner

Example: `ai-qa-01`

## Depends On

List issue numbers, contracts, decisions, or tasks that must be complete first.

## Deliverables

- Deliverable 1
- Deliverable 2

## Definition Of Done

- [ ] Implementation complete
- [ ] Verification complete
- [ ] Review ready
- [ ] Handoff note prepared

## Risks

What could block or degrade this task?

## Next Handoff

Who should receive the next handoff after this task is complete?
